message:
feat(FJ-P2C-004-F): differential oracle + metamorphic + adversarial validation

16 conformance tests for dispatch/AD/effects runtime:
- 5 oracle tests: grad(x²), grad(sin), grad(exp), grad(x²+2x) with
  three-way comparison (analytical, reverse-AD, forward-JVP); dispatch
  JIT identity verification
- 4 metamorphic tests: linearity of differentiation, grad of constant=0,
  AD-vs-finite-diff cross-check, effect token ordering
- 7 adversarial tests: non-scalar grad, empty args, mismatched vmap dims,
  scalar vmap input, double grad, double vmap, evidence mismatch

All tests produce structured test logs via fj-test-utils.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
